2236260.name: Baby Snow and the Shards of Tiger's Bane
2236260.description:
Game Description

A lone snowman rises to defend a frozen land overrun by tigers. Guided by the wise polar bear Ockichewa, you’ll explore a hand-crafted 2.5D world filled with danger, mystery, and magic. 

Story

When Tigers invade the Snowman Kingdom it is up to Baby Snow to defeat them.

In this game you take on the role of the courageous Baby Snow. Travel across the land in search for the shards of the shattered Blade of Power. Find all the shards, reforge the sword and rescue Lady Penelope.

Blending the structure  of classic adventure games with modern 2.5D visuals, this game focuses on exploration, combat, and discovery.

Features 

  • 2.5D action-adventure gameplay: Inspired by classic top-down exploration.

  • Challenging combat: Based on classic Hack and Slash Action Platformers.

  • Hand-crafted world design focused on exploration and discovery.

  • 6 hours of playtime.
